---
title: "Option 3: Nottingham"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## ✅ This option was selected
Nottingham is confirmed! See [The Final Plan](final-plan.qmd) for the full confirmed itinerary, booking details, and calendar links.
:::

## Basecamp

- **Location:** Nottingham, East Midlands
- **Dates:** 25th - 27th Sept 2026

## The Itinerary

### Paintball — PaintballGames.co.uk

Full-day stag paintball experience with equipment, full-auto paintball guns, and 100 paintballs included. Stag package at £49.99 per person.

- **Time:** Arrive 10:00am, finish ~1:00pm
- Official page: [Stag Paintball Nottingham](https://www.paintballgames.co.uk/adult-paintballing/stag/)

---

### Go Karting — Team Sport Nottingham

Indoor karting with 2 × 15-minute sessions on track with a break. Must arrive 40 minutes before your session start time.

- Official page: [Team Sport Nottingham](https://www.team-sport.co.uk/go-karting-nottingham/)

**Available time slots:**

| Slot | Times | Price pp |
|---|---|---:|
| Morning | 09:00 – 12:35 | £44.96 |
| Afternoon | 13:45 – 15:55 | £47.96 |
| Evening | 17:05 – 19:20 | £44.96 |

---

### Evening: Bierkeller Oktoberfest

Authentic German Bierkeller experience in Nottingham city centre — steins, lederhosen, oompah band. Perfect Friday or Saturday evening activity.

---

### Accommodation: 5-Bedroom House, Nottingham

Large 5-bedroom home in the city — the whole group under one roof.

- **Price:** £834 for 2 nights (whole house)
- Official page: [Airbnb listing](https://www.airbnb.co.uk/rooms/1645131487707850616?adults=9&check_in=2026-09-25&check_out=2026-09-27)

---

## Getting Around

All activities are within Nottingham city — minimal driving, easy to get between venues. Paintball is in the morning, leaving a comfortable gap before the evening karting slot. Bierkeller is a short walk or Uber from the house.

### Suggested Weekend Flow

| Time | Activity | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **Fri evening** | Arrive, Bierkeller Oktoberfest | Settle in, kick off with steins |
| **Sat 10:00am** | Paintball — PaintballGames.co.uk | Done by ~1pm |
| **Sat ~1pm–4:30pm** | Lunch, freshen up | Plenty of time |
| **Sat 4:25pm** | Arrive Team Sport Nottingham | 40 mins before 17:05 slot |
| **Sat 5:05–7:20pm** | Go Karting | 2 × 15 min sessions on track |
| **Sat evening** | Food and drinks in the city | Evening free in Nottingham |

### Distances

| Leg | From | To | Distance | Drive time |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|
| 1 | 5-bed house | Paintball Games Nottingham | ~4 mi | ~15 min |
| 2 | Paintball Games | Team Sport Nottingham | ~3 mi | ~10 min |
| 3 | Team Sport Nottingham | 5-bed house | ~2 mi | ~10 min |
| 4 | 5-bed house | Bierkeller, city centre | ~0.5 mi | walking |
| | | **Total driving** | **~9 mi** | **~35 min** |

> All driving is short hops — easily covered by a minibus or shared Ubers.

## Cost Breakdown

### Activity and stay costs (group of 9)

| Item | Group cost | Per person |
|---|---:|---:|
| Paintball — PaintballGames.co.uk | £449.91 | £56.24 |
| Go Karting — off-peak slot (£44.96 pp) | £404.64 | £50.58 |
| Go Karting — afternoon slot (£47.96 pp) | £431.64 | £53.96 |
| Accommodation — 5-bed house | £834.00 | £104.25 |
| **Total (off-peak karting)** | **£1,688.55** | **£211.07** |
| **Total (afternoon karting)** | **£1,715.55** | **£214.44** |

> Group cost is for all 9 people; per person figure splits the total across the 8 paying guests (stag goes free). Bierkeller not included — pricing TBC.
